About

Built by someone who lived the problem.

CSorro OS began from real production, operations and project management experience — not from a generic SaaS template.

Cristian Sorensen

Founder of CSorro. Production Manager, creative operations specialist and builder of systems for teams, creators and businesses.

Contact meFounder page
Why CSorro exists

Businesses are spread across too many tools.

Projects in one app. Chat in another. Files somewhere else. Reviews, invoices, reports and clients scattered everywhere. CSorro is being built to bring that operational chaos into one workspace.

Experience

Built from production and project management.

Cristian has spent over a decade working around online production, gaming communities, creator teams, assets, approvals, timelines and delivery pressure.

Work with me

Looking for production, project or operations support?

The site still acts as a professional home for Cristian. If you are hiring or need operational help, CSorro shows both the thinking and the systems he brings to the table.

Vision

The operating system for modern teams.

The long-term goal is simple: one place for people, projects, storage, clients, finance, reports, communication and AI.

CSorro OS
Built in Hull, United Kingdom. The business operating system for modern teams.
